title: After Sora shutdown, Elon Musk says Grok Imagine not a loser, it is essential for AGI

title: With new India office, Japan eyes ties to counter China influence in South Asia on economic front
description: The development follows the India-Japan Summit last year, where both countries set a goal of achieving 10 trillion yen in India's private sector over the next decade. The new office will support expansion in areas like artificial intelligence, startups and critical minerals
